hooks.command: git -C ~/repos/shared-identity pull --ff-only 2>/dev/null; git -C ~/repos/work-memory pull --ff-only 2>/dev/null; git -C ~/repos/homelab-memory pull --ff-only 2>/dev/null; true

{ cd ~/repos/work-memory && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || { git commit -m "[machine-name] session-end autosave $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" && git push; }; } >> /tmp/memory-autosave.log 2>&1 ; true
